creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #3)
> Can't you just test whether it works?

You know the same question applies to you, a member of the games@ team that is responsible for maintaining the port[1], right?

[1] I recognize that the adoption of the port might have been unilateral, but I have to assume Rusmir is functioning completely within the agreements of the games@ team.
